description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded edges. The front is dominated by a large, black glass touchscreen display with a small circular button and a front-facing camera at the top. The back is metallic silver with a prominent, centered Apple logo and a single camera lens with a flash in the top left corner. The sides are slim and metallic, featuring physical buttons for volume and power, as well as a SIM card slot. The device is thin and lightweight, with a minimalist design and smooth, reflective surfaces. Its overall appearance is consistent with a premium mobile phone, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A slim, silver smartphone with a large black glass touchscreen, metallic back, and minimal physical buttons. Features a centered Apple logo and a single rear camera.
description_view_0: Front view shows a large black glass screen with a small circular button and a front-facing camera at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the slim metallic edge and a single elongated button, likely for volume control.
description_view_2: Back view displays a metallic silver surface with a centered Apple logo and a single camera lens in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the slim metallic edge with a power button and a SIM card slot.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, highly visible against the metallic surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank and turned off, showing no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens is located in the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a small flash.
attribute_button_layout: One circular home button is on the front below the screen, two elongated volume buttons are on the left edge, and a power button is on the right edge along with a SIM card slot.
